name: @on-par/software-factory
description: Multi-agent software factory monorepo — boss-worker-checker orchestration with multi-provider model routing and per-product constitutions.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @on-par/factory-config && npm run build -w @on-par/factory-core && npm run build -w @on-par/factory-cli && npm run build -w @on-par/factory-server
